NAME: 意澜舟（Penapalne）
DESC: 意澜舟（Penapalne）是一家诞生于伦敦、植根于上海的可持续时尚与生活方式品牌。该品牌主打“自然优雅（Naturally Elegant）”理念，将真实掉落的树叶和苹果纤维等纯植物基皮革相结合，手工打造极具环保意义的手袋、卡包及配饰。
DESC_EN: Born in London and rooted in Shanghai, Penapalne is a sustainable fashion and lifestyle brand. Guided by its “Naturally Elegant” philosophy, it pairs real fallen leaves with plant-based leathers such as apple fibre to handcraft eco-conscious handbags, card holders and accessories.
